basic_details.job_title: WCD Raipur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Legal Probation Officer, Paramedical Staff and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Women & Child Development Raipur (WCD Raipur) Various Contractual Posts Notification 2026 has been released on the official website www.raipur.gov.in. A total of 8 vacancies have been announced through the WCD Raipur Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation will be provided as per Chhattisgarh Government rules from General Administration Department. Maximum 45 years after all relaxations.

qualification.education_qualification: Varies by post (12th to Graduate + Experience)
qualification.details: Legal Probation Officer (DCPU): LLB degree from a recognized university. Minimum 2 years of experience in women and children's rights field with government/NGO/legal cases. Proficiency in MS Office/computer/web software. Outreach Worker (DCPU): 12th pass from a recognized board. Good communication skills. Preferably 1 year of experience in government/non-government in women/child welfare. Assistant Cum Computer Operator (CWC): 12th pass + one year computer diploma. Hindi/English typing 8000 Kcyph. Preferably 1 year of experience in women/child welfare. Child Welfare Officer / Careworker (Govt Boys Children Home, Mana Camp): Bachelors in Social Work/Sociology/Psychology/Law/Social Sciences. Minimum 2 years of experience in women/child development with government/NGO/legal. MS Office proficiency. Child Welfare Officer / Careworker (Govt Girls Children Home, Mana Camp): Bachelors in Social Work/Sociology/Psychology/Law/Social Sciences. Minimum 2 years of experience in women/child development with government/NGO/legal. MS Office proficiency. Counselor (Govt Girls Children Home, Mana Camp): Bachelors in Social Work/Sociology/Psychology/Public Health/Counseling + PG Diploma in Counseling and Communication. Minimum 2 years of experience in women/child development. MS Office proficiency. Housemother (Govt Girls Children Home, Mana Camp): Bachelors in Sociology/Psychology/Social Science/Law. Minimum 2 years of experience in child care/protection/rehabilitation/welfare in government/semi-government/international/grant-in-aid institutions or CWC/JJB/Childline. MS Office proficiency. Only females. Paramedical Staff (Govt Girls Children Home, Mana Camp): ANM/MPW or Nursing training certificate from a recognized institution. Minimum 2 years of experience as paramedical in government/semi-government/private hospital. Domicile: Chhattisgarh Permanent Resident (Domicile required).

vacancy_details.Post Name: Child Welfare Officer / Careworker (Govt Boys Children Home, Mana Camp)
Child Welfare Officer / Careworker (Govt Girls Children Home, Mana Camp)
Counselor (Govt Girls Children Home, Mana Camp)
Housemother (Govt Girls Children Home, Mana Camp)
Paramedical Staff (Govt Girls Children Home, Mana Camp)

salary_details.details: Legal Probation Officer (DCPU): ₹27,804 Per Month Consolidated Outreach Worker (DCPU): ₹10,592 Per Month Consolidated Assistant Cum Computer Operator (CWC): ₹11,916 Per Month Consolidated Child Welfare Officer / Careworker (Govt Boys Children Home, Mana Camp): ₹23,170 Per Month Consolidated Child Welfare Officer / Careworker (Govt Girls Children Home, Mana Camp): ₹23,170 Per Month Consolidated Counselor (Govt Girls Children Home, Mana Camp): ₹23,170 Per Month Consolidated Housemother (Govt Girls Children Home, Mana Camp): ₹14,564 Per Month Consolidated Paramedical Staff (Govt Girls Children Home, Mana Camp): ₹11,916 Per Month Consolidated

selection_process: Scrutiny of Applications Merit List (70% academic marks + max 10% experience marks) Shortlisting in 1:10 ratio Personal Interview / Skill Test (20 marks) Final Merit List and Waiting List
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for WCD Raipur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.raipur.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for WCD Raipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the WCD Raipur Various Contractual Posts is 18-05-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in WCD Raipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 8 vacancies for various contractual posts in Women & Child Development Raipur.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for WCD Raipur Recruitment 2026 is offline.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 21 years and the maximum age limit is 35 years for all posts.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for WCD Raipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the educational qualification required for the posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by post, ranging from 12th pass to Graduate degrees, along with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for WCD Raipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes scrutiny of applications, merit list based on academic and experience marks, shortlisting, and a personal interview/skill test.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary structure for the contractual posts?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from ₹10,592 to ₹27,804 per month, depending on the specific post.

faq.question: Q9. Do I need to be a resident of Chhattisgarh to apply?
faq.answer: Yes, Chhattisgarh Permanent Resident (Domicile) is required for all applicants.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website www.raipur.gov.in, and the link is provided in the 'Important Links' section.
